snippet.title: Milo Na Tum To Hum Ghabraye   Lata Mangeshkar   Golden Era Song
snippet.description:
#90sStyle #HindiSong #SadSong
:- Artist - Dev Fi & Dopali Bhardwaj
 :- Music - Prabhakar Kumar 
 :- Lyrics - Dev Raj
 :- Publisher - KME Network
📧 Email Contact - tcgmediagrouptmg@gmail.com
💬 WhatsApp: +91 7058450904

दिल को छू जाने वाला ये खूबसूरत गाना “मिलो ना तुम तो हम घबराएं” एक गहरी मोहब्बत और तड़प की कहानी बयान करता है। जब प्यार सच्चा होता है, तो दूरियां भी बेचैन कर देती हैं — यही एहसास इस गाने के हर शब्द और हर सुर में झलकता है। ❤️

इस गाने में एक ऐसे दिल की बात कही गई है जो अपने प्यार के बिना अधूरा है। मिलन की चाह, जुदाई का डर और दिल की बेचैनी को बेहद भावुक अंदाज़ में पेश किया गया है।

✨ अगर आपने कभी सच्चा प्यार किया है, तो ये गाना आपके दिल को जरूर छू जाएगा।

🎧 Credits:
Singer: Sonu Raj
Music: Sonu Music
Lyrics Dev Raj

📌 अगर आपको ये गाना पसंद आए तो:
👍 Like करें
💬 Comment करें
🔔 Channel को Subscribe करना न भूलें

#RomanticSong #SadSong #HindiSong #LoveSong #SonuMusic #90sStyle

snippet.title: PATI PATNI AUR WOH DO (Trailer): Ayushmann, Wamiqa, Sara, Rakul | Mudassar, Bhushan K, Juno | 15 May
snippet.description:
15th May se Prajapati Pandey macha rahe hain bawaal… Kaun Patni, Kaun Woh? Hal karenge saare sawaal… Parivaar sahit dekhein! 

Presenting the Official Trailer of "Pati Patni Aur Woh Do" starring Ayushmann Khurrana, Sara Ali Khan, Wamiqa Gabbi, Rakul Preet Singh, Vijay Raaz, Tigmanshu Dhulia, Vishal Vasistha, Guneet Singh, Durgesh Kumar, Ayesha Raza Mishra, Shireesh Kumar Sharma and Deepika Amin 

#PatiPatniAurWohDo in cinemas worldwide 15th May 2026!

Gulshan Kumar, B.R. Chopra & T-Series Present

​A T-Series Films & B.R. Studios Production

"Pati Patni Aur Woh Do"

snippet.title: Nas Nas Kyu Dukhe पिया मेरी नस नस के हो दुखे || Anjali Raghav & Karan Chaudhary !! Brajbhasha Song
snippet.description:
यह एक नया संगीत वीडियो है जिसमें एक महिला नाचती और गाती हुई दिखाई देती है। यह एक हिंदी song है जिसमें एक रोमांटिक bhojpuri song का अनुभव मिलता है। वीडियो में एक जोड़े को बातचीत करते हुए और अन्य लोगों को रंगीन पृष्ठभूमि में नाचते हुए देखा जा सकता है, जो इसे एक trending song बनाता है।
#nasnaskyudukhei
#nasnaskyudukhe

#newbrajsong

nas nas kyu dukhei, nas nas kyu dukhe, nas nas kyu dukhei, piya meri nas nas kyu dookhei, nas nas kyu dukhi song, balam meri nas nas kyu dukhei , nas nas kyu dukhi song dj, nas nas kyu dukhi song dance, nas nas kyu dikhe song dj remix, nas nas kyu dukhe, braj bhasha song, braj songs, anjali raghav new song, anjali raghav nas nas kyu dukhe, piya meri nas nas dukhe song, nas nas kyu dukhe remix, new braj bhasha song, new brajbhasha song 2026.

Song Credits:
🎵 Song Title: Nas Nas Kyu Dukhei (नस नस क्यों दूखै)
🎭 Starring: Anjali Raghav & Diler Kharkiyay
🎤 Singers: Diler Kharkiya
📝 Lyrics: Kabir Singhora
🎼 Music: JPS Music

LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du

#richadixit #prashantsingh #rakeshbabu #ayazkhan #shaileshmishra #gareebbetikeameersasural #trailer #trending #bhojpurimovie #bhojpuri 

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH RAMA PRASAD PRODUCTION

फ़िल्म – गरीब बेटी के अमीर ससुराल (भोजपुरी फिल्म )
कलाकार – ऋचा दीक्षित  , प्रशांत  सिंह  , राकेश  बाबू , अयाज़  खान शैलेशा  मिश्रा  , रम्भा   साहनी  , माया यादव  , ललित  उपाध्याय  , विनोद  मिश्रा  प्रकाश  जैस ,ज्योति मिश्रा,  सोनी राज 
बाल कलाकार - यशस्वी सिंह 
निर्देशक – अजय कुमार झा
कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह
लेखक - सत्येंद्र सिंह 
संगीतकार- ओम झा
गीतकार - प्यारे लाल यादव , मनोज  भावुक 
संकलन - गुरजंट सिंह
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन - 3 स्टूडियो
छायांकन- माही शेरला
प्रोमो एडिटर - राजीव सिन्हा 
 कोरियोग्राफर - मनोज गुप्ता ( जॉय )
आर्ट डायरेक्टर - अवधेश राय
B.G.M - राजा यादव  
 D.I  - विजय सिंह (मुन्ना )
साउंड मिक्सिंग  – कृष्णा  विश्वकर्मा 
एसोसिएट डायरेक्टर - मेजर खान 
कार्यकारी निर्माता - जे पी  गुप्ता 

निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, रामा प्रसाद

 म्यूजिक –  IVY Music 
सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी

B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – 
मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय, विशाल यादव


B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे
ऑफिस बॉय - कन्हैया झा

IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट - फाइनेंस  
प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , हिमांशु चौधरी


B4U - फाइनेंस

संतोष गर्ग , रविंदर साल्वी , शैलेश त्रिवेदी , प्रफुल्ल

FILM – GAREEB BETI KE AMEER SASURAL (Bhojpuri film)
STARCAST – RICHA DIXIT , PRASHANT SINGH , RAKESH BABU, AYAZ KHAN, SHAILESHA MISHRA , RAMBH SAHANI , MAYA YADAV , LALIT UPADHYAY , VINOD MISHRA ,PRAKASH JAIS 
SONI RAJ,JYOTI MISHRA 
CHILD ARTIST-YASHASVI SINGH
CONCEPT – SANDEEP SINGH 
DIRECTOR- AJAY KUMAR JHA
 WRITER  – SATYENDRA SINGH 
MUSIC DIRECTOR- OM JHA  
LYRICS –  PYARELAL YADAV , MANOJ  BHAWUK
 EDITOR- GURJANT SINGH
CINEMATOGRAPHER-MAHI SERLA
CHOREOGRAPHER- MK GUPTA(JOY)
ART DIRECTOR- AVDHESH RAI 
POST PRODUCTION – 3 STUDIO 
PROMO EDITOR – RAJEEV SINHA
SOUND MIXING – KRISHNA VISHWAKARMA
BG – RAJA YADAV
D.I - VIJAY SINGH  (MUNNA)
ASSOCIATE DIRECTOR-MAZER KHAN
EXECUTIVE PRODUCER-J.P GUPTA

PRODUCER- SANDEEP SINGH,RAMA PRASAD

Music – IVY MUSIC
Satellite and digital partner- B4U BHOJPURI

B4U CREATIVE TEAM 
MARUDA SHARMA ( E.P ), NEHA UPADHYAY, VISHAL YADAV 

B4U - LEGAL TEAM 
SANDEEP RANA , TRUSHNA PATEL ,POONAM SHINDE , AKANKSHA WAKODE MORE
OFFICE BOY – KANHAYA JHA 

IVY ENTERTAINMENT- FINANCE
PRADEEP K DAGA , JINELLE MASCARENHAS , VIPUL JAIN , NIVRUTTI PATIL , HIMANSHU CHAUDHARY

B4U – FINANCE TEAM
 SANTOSH GARG , SHAILESH TRIVEDI , PRAFULL GAIKWARD

snippet.title: Sing Geetham Official Teaser | Singeetham Srinivasa Rao | Nag Ashwin | Devi Sri Prasad | June 11
snippet.description:
Presenting the official teaser of #SingGeetham. In cinemas JUNE 11th, 2026.

𝐋𝐞𝐭’𝐬 𝐒𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐆𝐞𝐞𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐦… 🎶

#SSR61 is titled 'Sing Geetham'.

A story that has been waiting to unfold for 40 years…
A cinematic experience like never before is finally here! 🔥

Worldwide Theatrical Release On June 11th...

Cast: Ahilya Bamroo, Ayaan, Shalini Kondepudi, Siva Narayana, Banerjee and others....

Crew Details:
Director: Singeetham Srinivasa Rao
Producer: Nag Ashwin
Music Director: Devi Sri Prasad
Executive Director: Sankalp Gora
Lyricist: Shree Mani
Cinematographer: Ankur C
Production Designer: Aravind Mule
Additional Production Designer: Prakeerthi Uppalapati
Executive Producer: Geetha Gautham
Writers: Singeetham Srinivasa Rao, Gautami Challagulla, Shashank Chintalpudi & Rathna Sreekar, Nanda Kishore Emani, Rahul V Rajeshwar
Direction Department: Manikrishna, Srinivas Arumilli, Kamala Manohari, Vamsi Marella, Trishal V, Gowrov Rayudu, V Varma, Vikram, Vishwa Swaroop
Teaser Cut: Vamsi Marella (Nag Ashwin Fanboy)
Costumes: Ajay Kumar Namballa
Production Executive : Anil Kumar Lakkamraju
Digital Media PR & Marketing: Prasad Bhimanadham
PRO: Vamsi Shekar
Stills: Sai Krishna 
Making: Srinu Nalla
Sound Recordist: Kiran S, Chinna K, Songs Nagra, Ravi Teja G


#SSR61 #SingeethamSrinivasaRao #NagAshwin #DeviSriPrasad #VyjayanthiMovies #SwapnaCinema

snippet.description:
A beautifully crafted love story that captures the essence of everyday life and relationships ❤️

Here's EPIC Teaser. In Cinemas Very Soon.

CAST & CREW
Starring: Anand Deverakonda, Vaishnavi Chaitanya
Writer & Director: Aditya Haasan
Produced by: Suryadevara Naga Vamsi & Sai Soujanya
Music: Hesham Abdul Wahab
Cinematographer : Azeem Mohammad
Editing: Navin Nooli
Production designer: Avinash kolla 
Choreographer: Leelavathi
Costume designers: Sandhya Sabbavarapu

Chief associate directors: Dheeraj Vijay Asrani
Direction Department: Dwarakesh, C.Arjun reddy,Sirisha Andavolu, Harsha vejendla, Agasthya Dantuluri, 
Camera operator: Ashok Seepally
Associate cinematographer: D. Bhargav Chakravarthy, Shashank Kumar Singh
UK Cinematography Team: Abhed Parab, Pooja Sawhney, Parth Chauhan, Sushrut Koche
Online editor: Santhosh Kiran Billakurti
Associate editors: Santhosh Kiran
Billakurti, Anushaa Boga,Thallapelli Pavan Goud

Studio head :- k madan

Audio on Aditya music

Vocals: Hesham Abdul Wahab.

snippet.description:
Kaalo Chasmo (Official Video) Gulshan Music,Jaat Nia,Ruchika Jangid | New Haryanvi Dj Song 2026

Kaalo Chasmo (Official Video ) a New Latest Most Popular Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2026.Kaalo Chasmo Haryanvi Song Starring with Gulshan Music & Jaat Nia .This superhit Haryanvi Song Sung by Sandeep Surila & Ruchika Jangid. Music given by Gulshan Music. Penned by Farista. Copyright & Music label by Vats Records. 
  
#KaaloChasmo #GulshanMusic #JaatNia #RuchikaJangid #SandeepSurila #VatsRecords #NewHaryanviSongsHaryanavi2026 #NewHaryanviSongs2026 #HaryanviDjSongs2026
  
💫Click to create Instagram Reels : https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/1324933496148874?igsh=MXN1dGM0bnY1c2J5MA==

Starring :- Gulshan Music & Jaat Nia & Navya
Singer :- Sandeep Surila & Ruchika Jangid
Lyrics :- Farista , Naveen Vishu Baba
Music/Composer :- Gulshan Music (8168614500)
Mix&Master :- Diwan Arya
Director :- Farista
Edit-Di :- Satish Prajapati
Dop :- Karan Barnala
Mekup ;- Sashi
Spl Thnx : Ravi Rangi,Vats Records Team
Digital Promotion : Gulshan Music {8168614500}

Label & Copyright - Vats Records
Company Owner : Pawan Sharma
Producer : Gulshan Sharma

8168614500 , 7404210848

Kaalo Chasmo Song Lyrics : 

Ho Pilli Pilli Odhani Ko Lambo Lambo Ghunghat Look Yo Rajsthani Me
Re Kaalo Kaalo Chasmo Lgaake Chale Banno Thari Saint Marke Chunni Me
Re Aagre Ko Gaghro Re Gach Thare Lagryo Choli Rajsthani Me
Re Kaalo Kaalo Chasmo Lgaake Chal Banno Mhari Saint Marke Chunni Me

Re Mera Dhunga Matke
Re Mera Dhunga Matke
Ho Tere Ghaghre Me Kota Jaipur Latke
Re Tera Dhunga Matke
Re Tera Dhunga Matke
Ho Mere Ghaghre Me Kota Jaipur Latke
                                                (1)
Ho Gaddi Me Bi Dj Aale Gaana Tu Bajaiye Re
Re Gol Gol Gol Tu Kamar Matakaiye Re -2
Re Kamar Meri Ya Pkka Khajagi Maroda Je Me Nachi Mood Tufaani Me
Re Kaalo Kaalo Chasmo Lgaake Chale Banno Thari Saint Marke Chunni Me 
                                               (2)
Re Is Chail Gaabru Chore Gelya Hoya Thara Rista Ji
Thare Gaane Sunke Ji Mera Nachan Ne Kar Farista Ji-2
Laage Nach Nach Todegi Floor Meri Jaan Re Tu Aari Mood Tufani Me
Re Kaalo Kaalo Chasmo Lgaake Chal Banno Mhari Saint Marke Chunni Me

snippet.title: #Sathileelavathi Official Trailer | Lavanya Tripathi Konidela, Dev Mohan | Satya Tatineni | May 8th
snippet.description:
Get ready for the ultimate summer treat! 🌟 Presenting the official theatrical trailer of the Pakka Family Entertainer, #Sathileelavathi.

Launched by MegaPower Star Ram Charan, this breezy, fun-filled ride stars Lavanya Tripathi and Dev Mohan, bringing you non-stop laughs, beautiful moments, and pure cinematic magic. 🎬✨

🍿 Releasing Worldwide in Cinemas on May 8th!

If you loved the trailer, hit the LIKE button, SHARE it with your friends and family, and SUBSCRIBE to our channel for more updates! Let us know your favourite moment from the trailer in the comments below. 👇

🌟 Cast:
Lavanya Tripathi Konidela, Dev Mohan, Naresh, VTV Ganesh, Sapthagiri, Motta Rajendran, Jaffer Sadiq, Tagubothu Ramesh, Joshi and others.

🎬 Crew:
 Presented By: Anandi Art Creations
 Banner: Durga Devi Pictures
 Producer: Nagaa Mohan (MNMB)
 Director: Tatineni Satya
 Music: Mickey J Meyer
 Cinematography: Binendra Menon
 Dialogues: Udhay Pottipadu
 Art: Kosanam Vithal
 Editor: Sathish Surya
 Choreographers: Brinda, Muppiri Shravan
 Action: Jeevan Botimala
 Lyrics: Vanamali
 Line Producer: Dumpa Sreedhar Reddy
 Chief Co-Director: Venu Mandepudi
 Sound Effects: Ethiraj
 Stills: Sai Ram Maganti
 Publicity Designer: Sudhir
 VFX: Workflow
 DI: Deccan Dreams
 Promos: Vijay Cuts
 Marketing: Ticket Factory
 PRO: Mohan Thummala
 Music on: Zee Music Company

#Sathileelavathi #SathileelavathiTrailer #LavanyaTripathi #DevMohan #RamCharan #SatyaTatineni #MickeyJMeyer #TeluguMovies #Tollywood #TeluguTrailers #FamilyEntertainer #SathileelavathiOnMay8 #ZeeMusicSouth #TicketFactory #telugucomedy 

Watch the official trailer for #SathiLeelavathi, a family action drama that dives into the quirky world of wife-and-husband dynamics. This new trailer promises wholesome entertainment packed with relatable marital humor for all age groups. Get ready for one of the latest telugu new movies with this telugu movie trailer, arriving in cinemas near you on May 8th!

en.title: #Sathileelavathi Official Trailer | Lavanya Tripathi Konidela, Dev Mohan | Satya Tatineni | May 8th
en.description:
Get ready for the ultimate summer treat! 🌟 Presenting the official theatrical trailer of the Pakka Family Entertainer, #Sathileelavathi.

Launched by MegaPower Star Ram Charan, this breezy, fun-filled ride stars Lavanya Tripathi and Dev Mohan, bringing you non-stop laughs, beautiful moments, and pure cinematic magic. 🎬✨

🍿 Releasing Worldwide in Cinemas on May 8th!

If you loved the trailer, hit the LIKE button, SHARE it with your friends and family, and SUBSCRIBE to our channel for more updates! Let us know your favourite moment from the trailer in the comments below. 👇

🌟 Cast:
Lavanya Tripathi Konidela, Dev Mohan, Naresh, VTV Ganesh, Sapthagiri, Motta Rajendran, Jaffer Sadiq, Tagubothu Ramesh, Joshi and others.

🎬 Crew:
 Presented By: Anandi Art Creations
 Banner: Durga Devi Pictures
 Producer: Nagaa Mohan (MNMB)
 Director: Tatineni Satya
 Music: Mickey J Meyer
 Cinematography: Binendra Menon
 Dialogues: Udhay Pottipadu
 Art: Kosanam Vithal
 Editor: Sathish Surya
 Choreographers: Brinda, Muppiri Shravan
 Action: Jeevan Botimala
 Lyrics: Vanamali
 Line Producer: Dumpa Sreedhar Reddy
 Chief Co-Director: Venu Mandepudi
 Sound Effects: Ethiraj
 Stills: Sai Ram Maganti
 Publicity Designer: Sudhir
 VFX: Workflow
 DI: Deccan Dreams
 Promos: Vijay Cuts
 Marketing: Ticket Factory
 PRO: Mohan Thummala
 Music on: Zee Music Company

#Sathileelavathi #SathileelavathiTrailer #LavanyaTripathi #DevMohan #RamCharan #SatyaTatineni #MickeyJMeyer #TeluguMovies #Tollywood #TeluguTrailers #FamilyEntertainer #SathileelavathiOnMay8 #ZeeMusicSouth #TicketFactory #telugucomedy 

Watch the official trailer for #SathiLeelavathi, a family action drama that dives into the quirky world of wife-and-husband dynamics. This new trailer promises wholesome entertainment packed with relatable marital humor for all age groups. Get ready for one of the latest telugu new movies with this telugu movie trailer, arriving in cinemas near you on May 8th!

snippet.title: JETLEE Release Trailer | Satya | Ritesh Rana | Rhea Singha | Vennela Kishore | Kaala Bhairava
snippet.description:
JETLEE Release Trailer Out Now.
#JETLEE ready for takeoff in cinemas worldwide from May 1st 💥

Cast: Satya, Rhea Singha, Vennela Kishore, Ajay and others.

#JetleeTrailer #Satya #RheaSingha #VennelaKishore #RiteshRana #KaalaBhairava #ClapEntertainment #MythriMovieMakers

Crew :
Directed by Ritesh Rana
Produced by Clap Entertainment (Chiranjeevi (Cherry) and Hemalatha Pedamallu)
Presented by Mythri Movie Makers (Naveen Yerneni and Ravi Shankar Yalamanchili)

Posters : Shyam

snippet.description:
Subscribe करने के लिए क्लिक करें 👉 - http://goo.gl/ip2lbk

आप सब इस गाने का Reels बनाए - Make Your Reels :-

►Song - Ho Jaimhi Hamar
►Singer - Raushan Rohi
►Featuring - Jyoti
►Lyrics - Raushan Rohi, Ayush Raj Singh
►Music Director - Pappu Bhai
►Video Director - Kaushal Babua
►Company/ Label - Wave Music 
►Digital Marketing - Lokdhun 
►Whatsapp - 9718776677
►VG - 45623

♪ Spotify :

♪ Apple Music : 
♪ Amazon Prime Music : 
♪ YouTube Music : 
♪ Instagram Reels :

Connected with us !
👉 Follow us on Instagram :- https://www.instagram.com/wavemusic/
👉 Like us on Facebook :- https://www.facebook.com/WaveMusicIndiaofficial
👉Join Us on Whtsapp :- https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VacuoR1GpLHNjsDWYd2R
👉 Follow us on X ( Twitter ) :- https://x.com/WaveMusicWM?t=kKhpZOhFiLqswaThplIGBg&s=08 

#HoJaimhiHamar #wavemusic #bhojpuri #bhojpurisong2026 #bhojpurisong #wavemusic 
#RaushanRohi 

Lyrics 
मुखड़ा 
मैसेज प मैसेज करियौ करो ही ना सीन गे 
बहुते प्यार करियौ कइसे करमी यकीन गे...2 

कबले हम रखियौ बोल सबर गे 
दिलवा के दे दियौ खबर गे 
की कवन मंदिरिया जा के धागा हम बान्हियौ 
जेकरा से हो जैमहि हमर गे....2 

अंतरा-1 
दिन रात तोहरे खोवाब में डूबल रहियौ 
 बैठिये के जान एक कोनवा में 

तोरे फोटऊवा हम Dp लगइले हियौ 
बेर बेर खोल के देखियौ फोन में 
नाशिक हियौ हम तोहर जबर गे 
मिलतौ नै हमरा जईसन लभर गे 

कवन मंदिरिया जा के धागा हम बान्हियौ 
जेकरा से हो जैमहि हमर गे.....
कवन देवी देवता के पूजा हम करियौ 
जेकरा से हो जेमहि हमर गे......

अंतरा-2 
तोरा बिना हमर सब खुशी अधुरा गे 
जिनगी में आके कर दे पूरा गे 

जान से भी ज्यादा तोरा चाहो हऊ रोहिया गे 
आयुष के हखी कोहिनूर गे 
समय रहते कर ले हमर कदर गे 
हमनी के प्यार रहतौ अमर गे 

कवन मंदिरिया जा के धागा हम बान्हियौ 
जेकरा से हो जैमहि हमर गे...
कवन देवी देवता के पूजा हम करियौ 
जेकरा से हो जेमहि हमर गे..

की कवन मंदिरिया जा के धागा हम बान्हियौ 
जेकरा से हो जैमहि हमर गे....2 

अंतरा-1 
दिन रात तोहरे खोवाब में डूबल रहियौ 
 बैठिये के जान एक कोनवा में 

तोरे फोटऊवा हम Dp लगइले हियौ 
बेर बेर खोल के देखियौ फोन में 
नाशिक हियौ हम तोहर जबर गे 
मिलतौ नै हमरा जईसन लभर गे 

कवन मंदिरिया जा के धागा हम बान्हियौ 
जेकरा से हो जैमहि हमर गे.....
कवन देवी देवता के पूजा हम करियौ 
जेकरा से हो जेमहि हमर गे......

अंतरा-2 
तोरा बिना हमर सब खुशी अधुरा गे 
जिनगी में आके कर दे पूरा गे 

जान से भी ज्यादा तोरा चाहो हऊ रोहिया गे 
आयुष के हखी कोहिनूर गे 
समय रहते कर ले हमर कदर गे 
हमनी के प्यार रहतौ अमर गे 

कवन मंदिरिया जा के धागा हम बान्हियौ 
जेकरा से हो जैमहि हमर गे...
कवन देवी देवता के पूजा हम करियौ 
जेकरा से हो जेमहि हमर गे..

video credit 

ritika queen 
sharad shivhare 
Shoot with editing -patel


LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.description:
#AmaraMuzikOdia #ଛକିଶୂନ #ChhakiSuna #OdiaMovie #OdiaFilm #OdiaCinema #NewOdiaMovie #NewMovie #AnubhavMohanty #ThisRaja #MurderMystery #Thriller 

"Chhaki Suna" - IN CINEMAS THIS RAJA - 12th JUNE 2026 

Every murder leaves a clue. Every game has a winner. But in this story, winning might cost you everything. Witness the beginning of the most twisted investigation of the year. Presenting The first move of Chhaki Shuna featuring Superstar Anubhav Mohanty, Produced by Naveen Bhandari, Jagrati A. Mohanty & Suvam Mohanty, Directed by Manash Padhiary.

snippet.title: RESIDENT EVIL – Official Teaser Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
𝙰 𝚗𝚎𝚠 𝚎𝚛𝚊 𝚘𝚏 𝚎𝚟𝚒𝚕.
 
From the mind of Zach Cregger, director of Weapons and Barbarian. Watch the new teaser trailer for Resident Evil. Filmed for IMAX – in theatres 9.18. 

https://www.instagram.com/residentevil/
https://twitter.com/ResidentEvil
https://www.facebook.com/ResidentEvilMovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@resident.evil.movie

From the mind of visionary filmmaker Zach Cregger (Weapons, Barbarian) comes a thrilling — and terrifying — reinvention of the Resident Evil franchise. In an all-new story, Resident Evil follows Bryan (Austin Abrams), a medical courier who unwittingly finds himself in an action-packed, non-stop race for survival as one fateful, horrifying night collapses around him in chaos.
 
From Columbia Pictures and Constantin Film, in association with TriStar Pictures, Resident Evil hits theatres September 18, 2026.

Directed by: Zach Cregger   
 
Written by: Zach Cregger & Shay Hatten    

Produced by:
Robert Kulzer
Zach Cregger
Roy Lee
Miri Yoon
Carter Swan
Asad Qizilbash

Executive Producers:
Oliver Berben
Victor Hadida
Richard Wright
Robert Bernacci

Cast:
Austin Abrams
Zach Cherry
Kali Reis
and Paul Walter Hauser

Credits not final

This film is not yet rated by The Motion Picture Association. For future rating information, please visit www.filmratings.com.  

#ResidentEvil #ResidentEvilMovie #ZachCregger #SonyPictures #OfficialTrailer #AustinAbrams #ZachCherry #KaliReis #PaulWalterHauser

🚂 CAN 100 SUPERCARS STOP THE TRAIN? 😱🔥

Today in Grand Theft Auto V we test the craziest challenge ever! 💥 100 Supercars placed on the railway track… but can they STOP the speeding TRAIN? 🚂😱

Massive crashes, flying cars, chaos moments and insane destruction await till the end! 🤯🔥

👉 Watch till the end to see WHO WINS!
👍 Like, Share & Subscribe for more GTA 5 chaos videos/live streams!

snippet.title: Jai Shivrai | Raja Shivaji | Marathi | Riteish D | Ajay – Atul | In Cinemas 1 May
snippet.description:
जय शिवराय ही ललकारी घुमणार, छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराजांचा जयघोष होणार! 🚩

तुम्हां सर्वांच्या आग्रहास्तव महाराष्ट्र दिनानिमित्त सादर करीत आहोत 'जय शिवराय' व्हिडिओ साँग 🔥

आत्ताच आपलं तिकीट बुक करा! (U/A 16+) (मराठी आणि हिंदी)

‘हिंदवी स्वराज्याचे संस्थापक’ 🚩
छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराजांच्या प्रेरणादायी जीवनावर आधारित ‘राजा शिवाजी’ 

उद्यापासून आपल्या जवळच्या चित्रपटगृहात प्रदर्शित!

Jio Studios Presents 
A Mumbai Film Company Production
Raja Shivaji
Directed By: Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Produced By: Jyoti Deshpande 
Produced By: Genelia Deshmukh
Music Composed, Arranged, Conducted, Produced By: Ajay – Atul
Choreographer: Remo D’Souza
Cinematographer: Santosh Sivan (ASC, ISC)

 A Jio Studios Release

Music Composed, Arranged, Conducted, Produced by - Ajay – Atul
Marathi original Lyrics: Ajay - Atul
Special Thanks: Guru Thakur
Singer: Ajay Gogavale
Recorded and mixed by Vijay Dayal at YRF Studios
Assisted By: Sagar Sathe, YRF Studios
Song Mastered By: Donal Whelan at Hafod Mastering, UK
Recording Engineers at YRF Studios: Abhishek Khandelwal, Dileep Nair Strings and Brass : Budapest Scoring Orchestra, Hungary
Recording Studio: Rottenbiller Studios Conductor: Péter Illényi
Session producer: Bálint Sapszon
Orchestra Indian Representative: Balasubramanian G Recording Engineer: Dénes Rédly
Studio Assistant: Levente Böde Librarian: Kati Réti
Orchestrators: Abishek V, Balasubramanian G, Sanjay RA
Indian Percussion: Satyajit Jamsandekar, Prabhakar Mosamkar, Ratnadeep Jamsandekar, Omkar Ingawale, Raju Kulkarni, Varad Kulkarni, Ganesh Thorat, Sachin Bhangre, Shashank Hadkar, Runal Sawant, Nibban Lokhande, Vishal Sutar, Sandesh Kadam, Tejas Satardekar, Prasad Mayekar, Prashant More, Vijay Jadhav, Sachin Sawant, Keyur Barve, Ashish Aroskar
Chorus (Male): Umesh Joshi, ,Vijay Dhuri, Jitendra Tupe, Swapnil Godbole, Janardan Dhatrak, Vivek Naik, Shripad Lele, Siddhant Karawde, Mandar Pilwalkar, Vidit Patankar.

Indian Percussion: Satyajit Jamsandekar, Prabhakar Mosamkar, Ratnadeep Jamsandekar, Omkar Ingawale, Raju Kulkarni, Varad Kulkarni, Ganesh Thorat, Sachin Bhangre, Shashank Hadkar, Runal Sawant, Nibban Lokhande, Vishal Sutar, Sandesh Kadam, Tejas Satardekar, Prasad Mayekar, Prashant More, Vijay Jadhav, Sachin Sawant, Keyur Barve, Ashish Aroskar

Chorus ( Male ): Umesh Joshi, ,Vijay Dhuri, Jitendra Tupe, Swapnil Godbole, Janardan Dhatrak, Vivek Naik

Shripad Lele, Siddhant Karawde, Mandar Pilwalkar, Vidit Patankar

Story Screenplay: Ajit Wadikar, Sandeep Patil, Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Dialogue Writer: Prajakt Deshmukh
Additional Hindi Dialogues: Jaideep Yadav
Editor: Urvashi Saxena
Background Score: John Stewart Eduri

Associate Producer: Nandita Sachdev
Executive Producer: Sandeep Patil
Casting Director: Rohan Mapuskar
Sound Designer: Kunal & Parikshit
Primary Costume Designer: Rushi Sharma & Manoshi Nath
Secondary Costume Designer: Pournima Oak
Additional Wardrobe / Styling: Nafs [Rizwan Shaikh & Deeksha Sharma Khan]
Action Director: Dawid Szatarski & Manohar Verma
Hair-Makeup Designer: Audrey Sangma, Nitin Indulkar, Hakim Aalim & Kanta Motwani
Chief Assistant Director: Charul Patil
Director’s Assistant: Chandni Kargathra
Research Consultant: Ketan Puri
CG & VFX: Assemblage Entertainment
VFX Head of Production: Swapnil Khotkar
VFX Supervisor: Pushpendra Dubey & Swapnil Ambre
Di Studio: Prime Focus Limited
Di Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar
Post Producer: Takshit Pradhan
Visual Promotion: Just Right Studioz NX

Jio Studios Team: 
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary 
CEO Production & Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Head – Marathi Content: Nikhil Sane 
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu
   
Raja Shivaji, based on the life of India’s Greatest Warrior King – Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who rose against formidable powers to lay the foundation of Swarajya. Experience this grand historical spectacle on the big screen, unfolding in Marathi & Hindi
 
In Cinemas
1st May 2026

snippet.title: GTA V LIVE 🔥#shortsfeed #shortslive #gta #shorts #live #gta5
snippet.description:
Welcome to the ultimate GTA V live stream where we race fast cars, explore Los Santos, and vibe with chill gameplay. If you love high-speed races, smooth driving, and relaxed gaming streams, you’re in the right place. Join the live chat, suggest races, and enjoy nonstop GTA 5 fun with laid-back vibes. This stream is all about speed, style, and chilling with the community. Don’t forget to like, subscribe, and share the stream to support the channel and be part of the GTA V family.#gta6

snippet.title: Dharpakad - Official Trailer | Mallhar, Shruhad Goswami, Prashant Barot | Anish Shah | 15 May 2026
snippet.description:
Here’s the much-awaited trailer of Dharpakad. India’s first film on Digital Arrest. 

#Dharpakad | Arresting you in cinemas from 15th May 

November Films India & Indira Motion Pictures Presents
DHARPAKAD | Releasing on 15th May 2026

A Film by Anish Shah

Starring - Mallhar, Prashant Barot, Shruhad Goswami, Pratik Rathod, Jay Bhatt

Produced by Raahul Badal
Produced by Jay Shah & Anish Shah

Credits:
Story: Anish Shah & Himalay Dave
Screenplay: Anish Shah & Ankit Gor
Additional Screenplay: Dev Mehta
Dialogues: Ankit Gor

Production Design: Chirayu Bodas

2nd Unit DOP: Bhavik Kadecha
Casting Director: Bhavesh Bhanu, Casting Craft
Hair Design: Nick Akhtar
Hair & Makeup Design: Bhoomika Chaturvedi
Costume Designer: Komal Patel
Mumbai Line Production: Kushal Saini
Action Director: Iliyas Shaikh
Art Director: Shailee Sheth, Chaitanya Parab

snippet.title: मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
snippet.description:
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

#radhakrishna #radhabhajan #krishnabhajan #radharani 
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा
mohe brij ko baniyo mor
राधे मोहे ब्रज को बनाइयो मोर
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne vrindavan ko
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne vrindavan ka
mohe mor banaiyo radha kratika thakur
mohe mor banaiyo radha ringtone
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne
mohe mor banaiyo radha rani
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne vrindavan ko song
mohe mor banaiyo radha bhajan
mohe mor banaiyo radha radha
mohe mor banaiyo radha film
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne vindavan ko bhumika sharma
radha hit bhajan mohe mor banaiyo radha, mohe mor banaiyo to banaiyo vrindavan ko, peaceful radha krishna bhajan, mohe mor banaiyo radha, mohe mor banaiyo bhajan, farmani naaz mohe mor bhanaiyo radha, मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा, मोहे मोर बनाइय्यो राधा, radha krishna bhajan, radha krishna bhajan 2026, mohe mor banaiyo farmani naaz, mohe mor banaiyo to banaiyo, aagle janam radha morni banaiyo, mohe mor banaiyo, popul;er bhajan mohe mor, aagle janam radha sadhu banaiyo, aagle janam radha bander banaiyo, 

Lose yourself in the sacred lanes of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition: "Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha." This Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan captures the deep desire of a devotee to become a peacock in the gardens of Nidhivan, just to be close to Radha Rani and Krishna.

मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा - वृंदावन की इस पावन धुन में खो जाएँ। Bajao Bhakti आपके लिए लेकर आया है श्री राधा-कृष्ण की महिमा का एक ऐसा भजन जो आपके हृदय को शांति और आनंद से भर देगा।

यह मधुर और भावपूर्ण Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan ब्रज की पावन भावना और राधा-कृष्ण के दिव्य प्रेम को समर्पित है।
“मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधाअपने वृंदावन को” – यह पंक्ति भक्त की उस विनम्र प्रार्थना को दर्शाती है, जहाँ वह ब्रजधाम में मोर बनकर भी राधा-कृष्ण के चरणों में रहना चाहता है।

यह भजन ध्यान, जप, सुबह-शाम की पूजा, वृंदावन भक्ति, कीर्तन और मन की शांति के लिए अत्यंत उपयुक्त है। इसकी शांत धुन और प्रेमपूर्ण शब्द आत्मा को सुकून देते हैं और मन को वृंदावन की गलियों में ले जाते हैं।

Vrindavan Essence: Experience the 'Brij Ras' from the comfort of your home.

Soulful Peace: Perfect for morning meditation or evening relaxation.

📌 Keywords: Mohe Mor Banaiyo To Banaiyo Vrindavan Ko, मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा, Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan, Vrindavan Bhajan, Radha Krishna Song 2026, Bunty Thakur Bhajan, Krishna Meditation Music, Radha Rani Bhajan, Braj Bhakti Song

snippet.title: One Night Only | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
what would you do if you only had one night?

watch the trailer for one night only now. only in theaters august 7.
-----
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/onenightonlymovie 
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@onenightonlymovie
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/onenightonlymovie
X: https://www.twitter.com/1nightonlymovie  
Official Site: https://onenightonlymovie.com

What if one messy night turns out to be the best thing that ever happened to you? 

This summer, Will Gluck, the filmmaker of Anyone but You and Easy A, celebrates modern romantic comedy on the big screen with a fresh, witty, swoony original film about searching for love on the least romantic night of the year. 

Academy Award® nominee Monica Barbaro (A Complete Unknown, Top Gun: Maverick) and BAFTA nominee Callum Turner (Masters of the Air, Fantastic Beasts franchise) star as Allie and Owen, two love-starved strangers who crash into each other in an ever-so-slightly fictionalized New York City on the one night of the year when single people are allowed to have sex.

Recently dumped Owen and hopeful romantic Allie might be the only two singles in the city looking for more than just a quick encounter. They both feel a spark when they meet, but a series of missteps and side quests complicate their night, keeping them apart. As they each race toward and away from each other across the city, they just might discover that the one thing they want most is closer than they think.

The film’s electrifying cast includes Maya Hawke (Stranger Things), Julia Fox (Uncut Gems), indie pop sensation King Princess (Nine Perfect Strangers), Ben Marshall (Saturday Night Live), Ziwe (Baited with Ziwe), and screen legends Molly Ringwald and Levar Burton.

One Night Only is co-written, directed and produced by Will Gluck, based on a script from Travis Braun. The film is produced by Will Gluck through his company Olive Bridge Entertainment, and by Olive Bridge VP Jacqueline Monetta (exec producer, Anyone but You).

Academy Award® nominee Monica Barbaro (A Complete Unknown, Top Gun: Maverick) and BAFTA nominee Callum Turner (Masters of the Air, Fantastic Beasts franchise) star as Allie and Owen, two love-starved strangers who crash into each other in an ever-so-slightly fictionalized New York City on the one night of the year when single people are allowed to have sex.

Recently dumped Owen and hopeful romantic Allie might be the only two singles in the city looking for more than just a quick encounter. They both feel a spark when they meet, but a series of missteps and side quests complicate their night, keeping them apart. As they each race toward and away from each other across the city, they just might discover that the one thing they want most is closer than they think.

The film’s electrifying cast includes Maya Hawke (Stranger Things), Julia Fox (Uncut Gems), indie pop sensation King Princess (Nine Perfect Strangers), Ben Marshall (Saturday Night Live), Ziwe (Baited with Ziwe), and screen legends Molly Ringwald and Levar Burton.

One Night Only is co-written, directed and produced by Will Gluck, based on a script from Travis Braun. The film is produced by Will Gluck through his company Olive Bridge Entertainment, and by Olive Bridge VP Jacqueline Monetta (exec producer, Anyone but You).

snippet.title: KANGULA - 4k Official Full Video l Sambeet Acharya, Anshuman l Aswin Tripathy @BABUBHAIPRODUCTION
snippet.description:
#kangulaodiafilm #babubhaiproduction #newodiasong


🎬 KANGULA – MAA KALI RA DANDA NACHA | OFFICIAL FULL VIDEO (4K)
🌺 In Cinemas Worldwide from 24th April 2026
When faith crosses limits…
When devotion transforms into शक्ति…
A divine force awakens beyond control.
Presenting the Official Full Video of KANGULA, a soul-stirring cinematic experience inspired by Odisha’s sacred Danda Nacha tradition — where pain becomes prayer, and devotion becomes शक्ति.
Rooted in the culture and soil of Odisha, powered by the fierce energy of Maa Kali, KANGULA brings a gripping tale of belief, sacrifice, mystery, and divine strength that echoes across generations.
This is not just a film…
This is a ritual.
This is the roar of faith.
🔱 The beats are louder.
🔥 The fire rises higher.
🌺 Maa Kali is here.
🎵 SONG CREDITS – "KANGULA"
Singer: Krishna Beuraa
Lyrics: Dr. Nirmal Nayak
Music: Baidyanath Dash
Music Arrangements: Abhishek Panigrahi
Recorded, Mixed & Mastered by Somesh Satpathy @ Somesh Studio
🎥 FILM CREDITS

Starring : Navpreet Arora
Producer: Suvendra Kumar Malla (Litu) & Sambeet Acharya
Director: Aswin Tripathy
Line Producer: Subodha Mohapatra (Bubu)
Story: Sambeet Acharya
Screenplay & Dialogue: Amit Kumar Dash & Anil Barik
Music: Baidyanath Dash, J N Padma & Sumit Dixit

snippet.title: Kanave | Mrz Thoppi | Gallery Vision Indie
snippet.description:
Presenting “Kanave” Official Lyrical Video, sung by MRZ Thoppi and Dharsana, with lyrics and composition by Jaqer. Produced by Sharaf Gallery and presented by Gallery Vision Indie.

Music Credits: 

Vocals : MRZ Thoppi, Dharsana
Lyrics & Composition : Jaqer
Additional Lyrics : Ali Najih
Produced by : Sharaf Gallery
A&R and Project Design : Suhas KS
Executive Producer : Kiran Benny
Project Coordination : Moidu Amar
Mix & Master : Zeusheelan 
Studio : Gallery Vision Audio Hub 
Label Manager : Jinu AJ
Lyrical Video : Binoyka
Ai Support : Aflalul Hashim 
Poster Design: Muhsin Raziey

Click here to get all streaming platforms links👇   
   
Youtube Music : https://bit.ly/3QNIouk
JioSaavn : https://bit.ly/4n1RuQ2
Deezer : https://bit.ly/3OVcYle
Youtube : https://bit.ly/4dl8eOY
Instagram Audio : https://bit.ly/4cQsxCs

Lyrics:

Kanave nee marayathe 
Mizhiyil maayathe...
Ninave piriyaathe
En hridhayam neerunne.....

Irulai en lokam 
Idarunnen nenjam 
Thirayunnee sneham 
Ariyum nin shwasam (2)

Innu maayum mazhaye 
Ennil theeyaayi niraye 
Thedum akale akale 
Theera kadalin thiraye
Ennil theerum ulakam
Manjil theeyaayi urukum
Thammil piriyan orungum 
Neram thaane thalarum 

..Ohhhhh... Ohhhh...
Ohhhhh...Ohhhhhh...Ohhhh.

aaa...aaaaa...aaa...    

Theeyaayi nenjil neerum kanalai udalil 
Ninnil aliyan njanum pathiyee....

Mazhayayi nanayan 
Ninn... Maaril punaran 
Ithalai viriyaan njanum azhake..........

Irulai en lokam 
Idarunnen nenjam  
Thirayunnee sneham 
Ariyum nin shwasam (2)

..Ohhhhh... Ohhhh...
Ohhhhh...Ohhhhhh...Ohhhh.

Ohhhhhhhhhh....

Mrz Thoppi👇
https://open.spotify.com/artist/78q0iNXpcPCsF9YOYQDoXw

snippet.title: Jibana O Marana | ଜୀବନ ମାୟାର ଖେଳ ମରଣ ହିଁ ସତ୍ୟ | Soulful Odia Bhajan Jukebox | Odia Bhakti Dhara
snippet.description:
ଏହି ସଂସାର ଏକ ରଙ୍ଗମଞ୍ଚ ଏବଂ ଆମେ ସମସ୍ତେ ସେହି ମାୟାଧରଙ୍କ ହାତର କଣ୍ଢେଇ। ଜୀବନ ଆସେ ପୁଣି ଚାଲିଯାଏ, କିନ୍ତୁ ରହିଯାଏ କେବଳ ପ୍ରଭୁଙ୍କ ନାମ 

Singers : Namita Agrawal, Satyajeet Pradhan, Md.Aziz, Sonu Nigam, Anasuya Nath, Subash Dash, Sourav Nayak, Tapu Mishra

ସବୁ ବନ୍ଧନମୋ ଖୋଲିଦେଇ ପ୍ରଭୁ - 00:00
ମୁଁ ଦି ଦିନର କୁଣିଆ - 05:26
ତୋ ବାହୁଡ଼ାରେ ନେ ବାହୁଡେଇ - 10:14
ଧିରି ଧିରି କରି ଖେଳୁଥା ଦୋଳି - 14:49
ଲିଭି ଯାଉ ମୋର - 20:05
ଜୀବନ ଦି ମୁଠା ମାଟି - 25:33
ବେଦୀ ମୁଣ୍ଡେ ଖେଳ - 29:47
ଏମିତି ଏକ ସମୟ ଆସେ - 35:17
ଅଳିକ ଜୀବନ - 46:09
ଆସିବା ଦିନେ ଯିବାତ ଦିନେ - 51:48
ଦୁଃଖ ମୋ କଜଳ ଗାର - 56:29

snippet.title: Kala Tikli / New Nagpuri sadri dance video 2026 / Santosh Daswali Official / Anjali Tigga / Vinay
snippet.description:
स्वागत है 2026 के सबसे बड़े Nagpuri  धमाका video सॉन्ग "Kala Tikli " में! इस वीडियो में आपको मिलेंगे Santosh Daswali और Anjali Tigga, जो नागपुरी और हो भाषा में भी मशहूर हैं। यह गाना Mayang Mayang 2 Song के ट्रेंड से इंस्पायर्ड होकर बनाया गया है, जो इस साल का सुपरहिट फ्यूज़न है।

Song- Kala Tikli / New Nagpuri sadri dance video 2026 / (Moy lagaye lelo kariya chasma)

Santosh Daswali Official Presents

Feat- Santosh Daswali & Anjali Tigga & Priya Sandil

Dop- Shiva Angrai , Mukesh Mahato, Goutam Addy

Drone - Mukesh Mmr 

Mackup - Ravi Singh Sardar , Sunny lamay

Director Choreographer Editor - Santosh Daswali 



Special thanks to Joya Series, Aditya Birua, Jony Bhuiya







*Special 2026 Edition:* Inspired by Nagpuri and Ho culture, this song blends trending elements from Mayang Mayang Song to bring you a unique 2026 Nagpuri hit.

*लाइक, शेयर और सब्सक्राइब करें!*

*Contact - Santosh Daswali insta I'd - https://www.instagram.com/santoshdaswali?igsh=dTlqZDM3NHdsdDN3


email- santoshdaswali111@gmail.com

snippet.title: Radha Radha Lyrical Video | Brindhavihari | GoldenMega⭐Ganesh | Sid Sriram | VNP | Hesham AbdulWahab
snippet.description:
Presenting the"Radha Radha" in the voice of Sid Sriram is pure Love bliss. 🎶✨ Surrendering to this melody.Song from the film BRINDAVIHARI🎶✨
Exclusive Only On Anand Audio Official Youtube Channel..!!! 

“Music Slate”
Cast : Golden Mega Star Ganesh , Devika Bhat, Malvika Sharma, Lakshmi, Ram Kumar, Rangayana raghu, Achyuth kumar, Sadhu Kokila, Avinash, Kuriprathap, Manju Pavagada, Jagappa, Giri. 
Music Composed, Produced and Arranged by : Hesham Abdul Wahab.
Lyrics : Kaviratna V Nagendra Prasad
Singers : Sid Sriram & Chinmayi

--  Also Listen RAMA RAMA 
To Listen On Your Favourite Music Streaming Platform
♪ JioSaavn: https://tinyurl.com/2k8wrew5 
♪ Amazon Prime Music: https://tinyurl.com/rm76utce 
♪ Apple Music: https://tinyurl.com/5ybfepeu 
♪ Spotify Music: https://tinyurl.com/ycytays7  
♪ Insta: https://tinyurl.com/2kk8cbnb
♪ Gaana Music: https://tinyurl.com/58em3twy
♪ YouTube Music: https://tinyurl.com/2b2ea9js
-- 
Lyrics:
Pallavi:

Hadinaaru saavira Gopaala sthreeyara cheluvannu meeridaa Raadhike
Hadinaalku lokadaa manasoore maaduthaa
Nanagaagi jaaridaa taarike

Ninthale vaaluvaa gaarudi aagide
Idu yaava maayaa manthraano???
Kunthale theluvaa sambhrama moodide
Bisilalli maleya milanaano???

Raadha Raadha ninna mouna sambhaashane
Jeevada aakarshane nannaane….
Jeevadali dhaaraa dhaaraa ninna mouna samvedane
Bhaava santharpane nannaane

 ----

Charana 1:

Maddenu illade madaveri ninthiro
Maddhaane naanu aagode
Makaranda heeruthaa mai thumbikondiro
Dumbiya haage naanaade

Naaninna hesaranne gunugunugide
Kudidanthe raama rasaa… oo
Ninthalle bhoomina naa sutthide
Ee paada paadarasaa

Raadha Raadha ninna mouna sambhaashane
Jeevada aakarshane nannaane….
Jeevadali dhaaraa dhaaraa ninna mouna samvedane
Bhaava santharpane nannaane

Charana 2:

(F)
Manasoora daarige kanasoora mallige
Mruduvagi haasuvaa chaaliyo
Hareyoora therige thusugampu kedage
Manasaare Chelluvaa modiyo

(M)
Jeevave ontharaa
Premadaa nantharaa
Jagavella janthara mantharavo

Summane iddaru
Enano heluvaa
Prathimegala haage nannolavo…

Raadha Raadha ninna mouna sambhaashane
Jeevada aakarshane nannaane….
Jeevadali dhaaraa dhaaraa ninna mouna samvedane
Bhaava santharpane nannaane
Aaa… aa..
--- 
 
 “Musicians”
Composed, Produced and Arranged by Hesham Abdul Wahab.
Lyrics: Kaviratna V Nagendra Prasad.
Singer: Sid Sriram & Chinmayi
Guitars & Bass: Sumesh Parameshwar.
Woodwinds,Strings Arranged and Produced by Josy Alappuzha.
Strings Conducted by: Josy Alappuzha.
Live Rythms and Percussions: Kalyan.
Halgi, Hand Duff, K-Dhol, Metal Shakers,
Pakhwaj, Puneri Dhol, Stk Duff, Tasha by Dipesh Varma.
Percussions performed by Dipesh Varma, Khwab Haria, Ratnadeep Jamsandekar, Vijay Jadhav
Additional programming: Josy Alappuzha, Vichuuuh and Praboa.
Mix and Mastered by Harishankar V at Aural Alchemy Kochi.
Mix Assisted by Santom Jose, Azhar Thaju.
Strings: Francis Xavier,Herald,Carol george,Dany, FrancisTS,Albin Jose, Mariadas, Subin Kumar.
Chorus:Sony Mohan,Aavani Malhar, Anila Rajiv, Ajmal Fathima, Neethusha AC,
Dr.Maalavika,Angel Mary Joseph,Anna Merin Easo, Zia and Dhana.Milan Joy, Akash V H, Amal C Ajith, Amithav Suresh, Akhil Dev, Famis Muhammad, Siyad k, Tansen Berny, Sangeeth Panchamam, Arjun B Nair, Deric Dereesh.
Recording Engineers:Shiju ediyatheril at Audio Gene Kochi, Aswin Kumar at K7 studio Kochi, Hesham Abdul Wahab, Vichuuuh & Praboa at HW studio Kochi, Vijay Dhayal and Sagar Sathe at YRF studio, Mumbai.
Assistant Recording Eng: Pete Dane Vaz at AudioGene Kochi, Gokul Krishna at K7 studio Kochi. Rahul Sahajrao at YRF Mumbai.

Lyrics:
Pallavi:

Hadinaaru saavira Gopaala sthreeyara cheluvannu meeridaa Raadhike
Hadinaalku lokadaa manasoore maaduthaa
Nanagaagi jaaridaa taarike

Ninthale vaaluvaa gaarudi aagide
Idu yaava maayaa manthraano???
Kunthale theluvaa sambhrama moodide
Bisilalli maleya milanaano???

Raadha Raadha ninna mouna sambhaashane
Jeevada aakarshane nannaane….
Jeevadali dhaaraa dhaaraa ninna mouna samvedane
Bhaava santharpane nannaane

 ----

Charana 1:

Maddenu illade madaveri ninthiro
Maddhaane naanu aagode
Makaranda heeruthaa mai thumbikondiro
Dumbiya haage naanaade

Naaninna hesaranne gunugunugide
Kudidanthe raama rasaa… oo
Ninthalle bhoomina naa sutthide
Ee paada paadarasaa

Raadha Raadha ninna mouna sambhaashane
Jeevada aakarshane nannaane….
Jeevadali dhaaraa dhaaraa ninna mouna samvedane
Bhaava santharpane nannaane

Charana 2:

(F)
Manasoora daarige kanasoora mallige
Mruduvagi haasuvaa chaaliyo
Hareyoora therige thusugampu kedage
Manasaare Chelluvaa modiyo

(M)
Jeevave ontharaa
Premadaa nantharaa
Jagavella janthara mantharavo

Summane iddaru
Enano heluvaa
Prathimegala haage nannolavo…

Raadha Raadha ninna mouna sambhaashane
Jeevada aakarshane nannaane….
Jeevadali dhaaraa dhaaraa ninna mouna samvedane
Bhaava santharpane nannaane
Aaa… aa..

snippet.title: KULBIR JHINJER: KALLA KALLA TAARA | Deep Jandu | Geet Goraya | New Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
White Hill Music Presents Kalla Kalla Taara — Out Now 🌌✨ | New Punjabi Song 2026

When words fall short, music speaks… Kalla Kalla Taara is a soothing Punjabi melody that brings calm vibes, love, and beautiful feelings together. ✨ Kulbir Jhinjer delivers a smooth and soulful performance, with lyrics by Lally Mundi and music by Deep Jandu creating a relaxing musical experience.

If you enjoy latest Punjabi songs 2026 and soft Punjabi music, this track is perfect for your playlist. 🎶 The cinematic video by Shavvy featuring Gurjot Kaur adds a visually pleasing touch to this melodious track.

🌙 Sit back, relax & let the melody flow…
💬 Tell us where you’re listening from & how this song makes you feel

en.description:
White Hill Music Presents Kalla Kalla Taara — Out Now 🌌✨ | New Punjabi Song 2026

When words fall short, music speaks… Kalla Kalla Taara is a soothing Punjabi melody that brings calm vibes, love, and beautiful feelings together. ✨ Kulbir Jhinjer delivers a smooth and soulful performance, with lyrics by Lally Mundi and music by Deep Jandu creating a relaxing musical experience.

If you enjoy latest Punjabi songs 2026 and soft Punjabi music, this track is perfect for your playlist. 🎶 The cinematic video by Shavvy featuring Gurjot Kaur adds a visually pleasing touch to this melodious track.

🌙 Sit back, relax & let the melody flow…
💬 Tell us where you’re listening from & how this song makes you feel
🔔 Subscribe for more soothing Punjabi music

snippet.title: Franklin Almost Lost His Kids to Crocodiles… 😱 Last Minute Rescue! | GTA 5 Malayalam
snippet.description:
Franklin is back in a high-stakes rescue mission! 😱

After the shocking events, his children are captured and held inside a mysterious lab capsule… and dangerous brainrot crocodiles are guarding them.

With the help of Trevor, Franklin tracks down the evil scientist behind everything and prepares for his biggest fight yet! 🔥

Will he save his kids in time? Or is it already too late?

⚡ Watch till the end for a shocking twist!

This GTA 5 Malayalam story features intense action, emotional moments, and cinematic gameplay.

👇 Comment what should happen in PART 3!

snippet.title: राधा कृष्ण प्रेम | Jo Prem Gali Me Aaya Nahi | जो प्रेम गली में आया नहीं | कृष्ण भक्ति में लीन
snippet.description:
🙏 Welcome to Soulful Serenity 🙏
"Jahan Bhakti milti hai Shakti se aur Mann ko milta hai Sukoon." 🌸

🎵 Song : - Jo Prem Gali Me Aaya Nahi
🎤 Singer: - Aavya Dubey 
✍️ Lyrics / Writer: - Traditional
🎼 Music: - 
🏢 Music Label / Company: - SK Entertainment
📀 Category: - Spiritual / Devotional Music

Is channel ka maksad sirf sangeet sunana nahi, balki aapko ishwar ke aur kareeb lana hai. Aaj ki is bhag-daur bhari zindagi mein, hum aksar apne mann ki shanti kho dete hain. Soulful Serenity ek aisi jagah hai jahan aapko milenge:

✨ Mann ko shanti dene wale Bhajans
✨ Sangeetmay Aarti aur Chalisa
✨ Dhyan aur Positivity bhare Mantras

snippet.title: अनमोल पुराने फ़िल्मी गाने | Old Hindi Gaane | Purane Gaane | Filmi Gaane | Anmol Gaane
snippet.description:
अनमोल पुराने फ़िल्मी गाने | Old Hindi Gaane | Purane Gaane | Filmi Gaane | Anmol Gaane

कोई शहरी बाबू
फिरकी वाली तू कल फिर आना
चल सन्यासी मंदिर में
शीशी भरी गुलाब की
बिंदिया चमकेगी
मैं जट यमला पगला दीवाना
चना जोर गरम
पूछे जो कोई मुझसे
आने से उसके आए बहार
अठरा बरस की तू होने को आई
मुझे इश्क है तुझी से
तुमने किसी की जान को
तारीफ करूं क्या उसकी
कितनी जवां है जिंदगी
ये तेरी सादगी
दिल खुश है आज
दिल बेकरार सा है
हमीं से मोहब्बत, हमीं से लड़ाई
पहले मिले थे सपनों में
मैं प्यार का दीवाना

localized.description:
अनमोल पुराने फ़िल्मी गाने | Old Hindi Gaane | Purane Gaane | Filmi Gaane | Anmol Gaane

कोई शहरी बाबू
फिरकी वाली तू कल फिर आना
चल सन्यासी मंदिर में
शीशी भरी गुलाब की
बिंदिया चमकेगी
मैं जट यमला पगला दीवाना
चना जोर गरम
पूछे जो कोई मुझसे
आने से उसके आए बहार
अठरा बरस की तू होने को आई
मुझे इश्क है तुझी से
तुमने किसी की जान को
तारीफ करूं क्या उसकी
कितनी जवां है जिंदगी
ये तेरी सादगी
दिल खुश है आज
दिल बेकरार सा है
हमीं से मोहब्बत, हमीं से लड़ाई
पहले मिले थे सपनों में
मैं प्यार का दीवाना

snippet.title: Full Bhojpuri gana Ankit Jack Bhojpuri gana 🥰 tohar kamar hai ki Matka mara tha Kitna jhataka 🥰 👍🥰
snippet.description:
🔥 #AnkitJackComedy #ShilpiRaj #BhojpuriSong 🔥
🎶 Tohar Kamar Ha Ki Matka – ek dhamakedar Bhojpuri gana jo aapke dil aur dance floor dono ko hila dega! 💃🕺
Is gaane mein Ankit Jack ka zabardast comedy style aur Shilpi Raj ki superhit awaaz ka perfect combo dekhne ko milta hai.
💥 Energetic music, catchy lyrics aur full-on entertainment ke saath yeh song har Bhojpuri music lover ke liye must-watch hai.
🎥 Video mein masti, swag aur desi tadka aapko poora entertain karega!
👉 Agar aapko Bhojpuri gaane pasand hain, to is video ko Like 👍, Share 🔄 aur Channel ko Subscribe 🔔 zaroor karein!
📢 Apna pyaar aur support dikhate rahiye ❤️

snippet.description:
MY NEW GAMING BEAST
#laptop  #ujjwal  #technogamerz  

I finally got my hands on my new ultimate gaming machine, and this one seriously delivers on both power and performance. Meet the Alienware 16X and Alienware 16, powered by the latest Intel Core Ultra HX processors and Intel Core Series 2, bringing next-level gaming, multitasking, and efficiency. In this video, I unbox, test, and push these machines to their limits—from AAA gaming to real-world usage—so you know exactly which one is worth it.

snippet.title: Diwana Hai Ye Man - Salman Khan, Rani, Preity | Sonu Nigam & Alka Yagnik | Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
snippet.description:
"Diwana Hai Ye Man" ke jaadu mein kho jaaiye, jo 2001 ki blockbuster film "Chori Chori Chupke Chupke" ka ek behtareen romantic track hai. Sonu Nigam aur Alka Yagnik ki awaaz mein ye gaana aaj bhi dilon ko chhu leta hai. Salman Khan, Rani Mukherjee aur Preity Zinta ki chemistry aur Anu Malik ka sangeet ise ek evergreen hit banata hai.

Is nostalgic melody ko enjoy karein aur apne doston ke saath share karein!

Credits:

Singer(s): Sonu Nigam & Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Anu Malik
Lyricist: Sameer
Cast: Salman Khan, Rani Mukherjee, Preity Zinta
Director: Abbas-Mustan

Lyrics:

दीवाना है यह मन
क्यूँ पागल है धड़कन
क्यूँ तुझपे मुझे प्यार आया है
यह मौसम क्यूँ सजे
यह पायल क्यूँ बजे
यह कैसा खुमार छ्चाया है
कोई बता दे, कोई बता दे, कोई बताए ना
यह मैं जानूं या तू जाने
इस बात को कोई क्या जाने, ओह
दिल, तेरा मेरा दिल, झूमे रे झूमे
दिल, तेरा मेरा दिल, झूमे रे झूमे
मैने तेरी धड़कानों पे सनम
अपनी वफ़ा की कहानी लिखी
मैने तेरे नाम जाने जिगर
अपनी हसीन ज़िंदगानी लिखी
यह काजल क्यूँ हासे
यह नैना क्यूँ झुके
यह कैसा निकाह मुझपे आया है
कोई बता दे, कोई बता दे, कोई बताए ना
यह मैं जानूं या तू जाने
इस बात को कोई क्या जाने, हो
दिल, तेरा मेरा दिल, झूमे रे झूमे
दिल, तेरा मेरा दिल, झूमे रे झूमे
ओ मेरे रब्बा, तेरा शुक्रिया
जो मैने माँगा मुझे मिल गया
मेरी मोहब्बत असर कर गयी
ख्वाबों का माहेका चमन खिल गया
यह बंधन क्यूँ बँधे
यह रिश्ते क्यूँ जुड़े
यह मौसम क्या संदेसा लाया है
कोई बता दे, कोई बता दे, कोई बताए ना
यह मैं जानूं या तू जाने

Song -  O Meri Laila
Singers - Jyotica Tangri
Music - Joi Barua
Lyrics - Irshad Kamil

Lyrics:

Patta Anaaron Ka Patta Chinaron Ka Jaise Hawaon Mein
Aise Bhatakta Hoon Din Raat Dikhta Hoon Main Teri Raahon Mein
Mere Gunaho Mein Mere Sawabo Mein Shamil Tu
Bhooli Atthanni Si Bachpan Ke Kurte Mein Se Mil Tu

Rakhoon Chhupa Ke Main Sab Se Woh Laila
Maangoon Zamane Se Rab Se Woh Laila
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila 

Teri Talab Thi Haan Teri Talab Hai
Tu Hi Toh Sab Thi Haan Tu Hi Toh Sab Hai
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila

O Meri Laila Laila Khwaab Tu Hai Pehla 
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila (X2)

Maangi Thi Duwaen Jo Unka Hi Asar Hai Hum Sath Hain
Na Yahan Dikhawa Hai Na Yahan Dunyavi Jazbaat Hain

Yahan Pe Bhi Tu Hooron Se Zyada Haseen 
Yaani Dono Jahanon Mein Tumsa Nahi
Jeet Li Hain Aakhir Mein Hum Dono Ne Yeh Baaziyan 

Rakhoon Chhupa Ke Main Sab Se Woh Laila
Maangoon Zamane Se Rab Se Woh Lailan
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila 

Teri Talab Thi Haan Teri Talab Hai
Tu Hi Toh Sab Thi Haan Tu Hi Toh Sab Hai
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila

O Meri Laila Laila Khwaab Tu Hai Pehla 
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila (X2)

Zaiqa Jawani Mein, Khwaabon Mein Yaar Ki Mehmaani Mein
Marziyaan Tumhari Hon, Khush Rahoon Main Teri Manmaani Mein

Band Aakhein Karoon Din Ko Raatein Karoon
Teri Zulfon Ko Sehla Ke Baatein Karoon
Ishq Mein Un Baaton Se Hon Meethi Si Naraaziyan

Rakhoon Chhupa Ke Main Sab Se Woh Laila
Maangoon Zamane Se Rab Se Woh Lailan
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila 

Teri Talab Thi Haan Teri Talab Hai
Tu Hi Toh Sab Thi Haan Tu Hi Toh Sab Hai
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila

O Meri Laila Laila Khwaab Tu Hai Pehla 
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila (X2)

snippet.title: GTA 5 LIVE | Train vs 100 Luxury Cars 😱🔥 कौन बचेगा?
snippet.description:
आज की इस 🔴 LIVE स्ट्रीम में हम Grand Theft Auto V के अंदर एक जबरदस्त एक्सपेरिमेंट करने वाले हैं!

🚗💥 100 लग्ज़री गाड़ियों को रेलवे ट्रैक पर खड़ा किया गया है
🚆 और सामने से आ रही है फुल स्पीड ट्रेन!

😱 क्या ये महंगी गाड़ियाँ ट्रेन को रोक पाएंगी?
या फिर सब कुछ हो जाएगा चकनाचूर?

👉 LIVE में जुड़ो और देखो कौन सी कार सबसे ज्यादा स्ट्रॉन्ग है!

🔥 Don’t forget to LIKE 👍 SHARE 📲 and SUBSCRIBE ❤️

snippet.title: Kaushik Bharwad | Bole Jina Jina Mor | Tejal Thakor | New Gujarati Song 2026 | Jhankar Music
snippet.description:
Jhankar Music Gujarati Present Latest Love Video Song titled "Bole Jina Jina Mor - બોલે જીણા જીણા મોર", Sung by Kaushik Bharwad, Tejal Thakor, Penned by Jashwant Gangani & Music Composed by Vishal Vagheshwari, Starring : Karan Rajveer, Kinjal Patel, & Directed by Dipak Turi
Join this channel:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCQeljbfXMX_5a2_KMXTkF-A/join

"બોલે જીણા જીણા મોર" જે જશવંત ગાંગાણી ની કલમે લખાયેલ અને લોક લાડીલા કૌશિક ભરવાડ, અને તેજલ ઠાકોર નાં સુંદર સ્વરની જુગલબંધી માં ગવાયેલ આ સોંગ તમને તમારા સાચા પ્રેમ ના સંબંધોને યાદ કરાવશે. સાચો પ્રેમ હંમેશા દિલમાં રહે છે...

🎬 𝐅𝐮𝐥𝐥 𝐕𝐢𝐝𝐞𝐨 𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐬 :

snippet.title: मंगल भवन अमंगल हारी | Ramayan Chaupayi | सम्पूर्ण रामायण कथा | Ravi Raj | Ram Katha 2026
snippet.description:
मंगल भवन अमंगल हारी | Ramayan Chaupayi | सम्पूर्ण रामायण कथा | Ravi Raj | Ram Katha 2026

 मंगल भवन अमंगल हारी – रामायण चौपाई 
इस वीडियो में Ravi Raj द्वारा प्रस्तुत सम्पूर्ण रामायण कथा और चौपाइयाँ सुनें। यह भजन और कथा राम भक्तों के लिए एक अनमोल अनुभव है।

 इस वीडियो में शामिल हैं:
मंगल भवन अमंगल हारी की चौपाई
सम्पूर्ण रामायण कथा का सार
रामायण के महत्वपूर्ण प्रसंग और सीख


ध्यान और भक्ति के लिए हेडफोन का उपयोग करें
वीडियो को लाइक, शेयर करें और चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें
रोज़ाना सुनने से जीवन में सुख और शांति आती है

 रामायण चौपाई, Ramayan Chaupayi, Mangal Bhavan Amangal Hari, Ravi Raj Ram Katha, सम्पूर्ण रामायण कथा 2026, राम कथा, Ram Katha 2026, Bhakti Songs, Indian Devotional Stories

snippet.title: Tumsa Koi Pyaara - Khuddar (1994) | Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik | Govinda, Karisma Kapoor
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song: Tumsa Koi Pyaara
Movie: Khuddar (1994)
Singer(s): Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Anu Malik
Lyricist: Rahat Indori

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: N. R. Pachisia
Director: Iqbal Durrani
Cast: Govinda, Karisma Kapoor, Kader Khan, Shakti Kapoor

Song Lyrics:

Barsat Ka Mausam Yahan Hum Yahan Tum
Sajni Ko Milgaye Saajan Saajan Saajan
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masoom Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum
Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Lakho Hai Magar Tumsa Yahan
Kaun Haseen Hai
Tum Jaan Ho Meri Tumhein Maloom Nahi
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masoom Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Lakhon Hai Magar Tumsa Yaha Kaun Haseen Hai
Tum Jaan Ho Meri Tumhen Maloom Nahi
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masoom Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai

Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masoom Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Sau Phool Khile Jab Ye Khila Roop Sunhara
Sau Chand Bane Jab Ye Bana Chand Sa Chehra
Sau Phool Khile Jab Ye Khila Roop Sunhara
Sau Chand Bane Jab Ye Bana Chand Sa Chehra
Itna Bhi Koi Pyar Ki Raho Mein Ghoom Na Ho
Bas Hosh Hai Itna Mere Saath Mein Tum Ho
Mere Saath Me Tum Ho, Mere Saath Me Tum Ho
Dhadkan Hai Kahin Dil Hai Kahin Jaan Kahin Hai
Tum Jaan Ho Meri Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Ye Chandani In Ankhon Ka Saya To Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masum Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai

Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masum Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Ye Hoth Ye Palke Ye Nighahe Ye Adaye
Miljaye Khuda Mujhko Toh Main Lelu Balaaye
Duniya Ka Koi Bhi Gham Mere Paas Na Hoga
Tum Saath Mein Chaloge Toh Ye Ehsaas Na Hoga
Ehsaas Na Hoga, Ehsaas Na Hoga
Akash Hai Pairon Mein Hamare Ke Zameen Hai
Tum Jan Ho Meri Tumhein Maloom Nahi
Aisa Koi Mahbub Jamane Me Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Lakho Hai Magar Tumsa Yaha Kaun Hasi Hai
Tum Jan Ho Meri Tumhein Maloom Nahi
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masum Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masum Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai

#TumsaKoiPyara #Govinda #KarismaKapoor #KaderKhan #ShaktiKapoor #Khuddar #KumarSanu #AlkaYagnik #AnandMilind #TumsaKoiPyaraKoiMasumNahiHai

Tumsa Koi Pyaara | Kumar Sanu | Alka Yagnik | Khuddar | 1994

snippet.title: जाने क्यों लोग मोहब्बत किया | Mehboob Ki Mehndi | Lata Mangeshkar Songs | Leena Chandavarkar
snippet.description:
Dil se nikle geet, jo aaj bhi dhadkano mein base hain… Welcome to a journey of love and longing with the unforgettable voice of Lata Mangeshkar. In this video, we celebrate the magic of 'Jane Kyon Log Mohabbat Kiya' from the movie Mehboob Ki Mehndi, a song that beautifully captures the complexities and emotions of love in the 1970s. Lataji's soulful rendition brings to life the poignant lyrics and melodies, creating an atmosphere of pure emotion. 



Credits :

Song: Jane Kyon Log Mohabbat Kiya
Album: Mehboob Ki Mehndi
Artist: Lata Mangeshkar
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi 


Lyrics :

is zamane me, is mohabat ne
kitne dil tode, kitne ghar phunke
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
dil ke badale darde dil liya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

tanhayi milti hai, mahafil nahi milti
rahe mahobat me kabhi manzil nahi milti
dil tut jata hai, nakam hota hai
ulfat ye logo ka yahi anjam hota hai
koi kya jane, kyu ye parawane,
kyu machalate hai, gum me jalate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

sawan me aankho ko, kitana rulati hai
furasat me jab dil ko kisi ki yaad aati hai
ye zindagi yu hi barabad hoti hai
har waqt hotho pe koi fariyad hoti hai
na dawao ka naam chalata hai
na duao se kam chalata hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

mahabub se har gum manasub hota hai
din rat ulfat me tamasha khub hota hai
rato se bhi lambe ye pyar ke kise
aashiq sunate hai zafa ye yaar ke kise
bemurawat hai, bewafa hai wo,
us sitamagar ka apne dilwar ka,
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

snippet.title: कहो ना प्यार है (Happy) | Kaho Naa Pyar Hai | Alka Yagnik | Udit Narayan Songs | Amisha Patel
snippet.description:
🎶 Dive into the golden era of 2000s Bollywood with the timeless magic of Alka Yagnik and Udit Narayan! This video celebrates the heart-touching melody of 'Kaho Naa Pyar Hai (Happy)', a song that continues to resonate with love and joy. Their voices, like a gentle breeze, perfectly capture the essence of first love and eternal romance.

Relive the sweet memories and let the enchanting vocals of Alka Yagnik and Udit Narayan fill your heart with warmth. 'Kaho Naa Pyar Hai (Happy)' is more than just a song; it's a journey back to a time when love was pure, and music was poetry.



Credits :

Song: Kaho Naa Pyar Hai (Happy)
Album: Kaho Naa Pyar Hai
Artist: Alka Yagnik | Udit Narayan
Music Director: Rajesh Roshan
Lyricist: Ibrahim Ashk 



Lyrics :

I love you
Dil mera har bar
Yeh sunne ko bekarar hai
Kaho na pyar hai
Kaho na pyar hai


Ha tumse pyar hai
Ki tumse pyar hai


Inn pyari bato mein
Anjana iqrar hai
Kaho na pyar hai
Kaho na pyar hai
Kaho na pyar hai
Kaho na pyar hai


Pyar jahan mein hota nahi
Toh phir bolo kya hota
Pyar jahan mein hota nahi
Toh phir bolo kya hota
Duniya mein dil koyi
Kabhi na dhadka hota
Dhadka hai dil a yar mil
Yeh pyar ka ijhar hai
Kaho na pyar hai
Kaho na pyar hai
Kaho na pyar hai
Kaho na pyar hai

Kya karte hain bolo
Do premi do pagal

Kis bat ka intejar hai
Kaho na pyar hai

Kaho na pyar hai
Kaho na pyar hai

snippet.title: Patti Show | Athiradi | Tovino Thomas | Basil Joseph | Vishnu Vijay | Dabzee | Arivu | Suhail Koya
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe 👉 https://bit.ly/Saregama_Malayalam

Presenting the second single "Patti Show" from 'Athiradi' starring Tovino Thomas, Basil Joseph, Zarin Shihab, Riya Shibu and others. Directed by Arun Anirudhan. Music Composed by Vishnu Vijay

Song Credits: 
Song: PATTI SHOW
Movie: Athiradi
Singer: Dabzee, Arivu, Suhail Koya
Lyrics: Suhail Koya, Arivu
Music Composed, Arranged and Produced by Vishnu Vijay @ DRAVIDA STUDIOS, CHENNAI

STUDIOS:
Arivu vocals Recorded @ DRAVIDA STUDIOS, CHENNAI
Dabzee vocals recorded @ 2bq studios, Chennai
Artist Liaison & Distribution Manager : Poornima Kannan
Additional Music Producer : DOPEMYN
Music Production Manager : Christy Thomas Cherian
Studio Sessions Manager : Paul Renold
Artist Session Manager : K D Vincent
Mixing & Mastering : Sujith Sreedhar@The Masterhouse,2bq studios,Chennai. 
Assisted by Amal Mithu
Sessions manager:Vignesh Raj
            

Movie Credits: 
Directed By: Arun Anirudhan
Produced By: Dr. Ananthu S  &  Basil Joseph
Co-producers: Sameer Thahir, Tovino Thomas
Written By: Paulson Skaria, Arun Anirudhan
DOP: Samuel Henry
Editor: Chaman Chakko
Music Composer : Vishnu Vijay
Lyrics: Suhail Koya
Production Designer: Maanav Suresh
Costume Designer: Mashar Hamsa
Make Up: Ronex Xavier
Stunts: Action Sandhosh & Phoenix Prabu
Sound Designer: Nixon George
Production Controller: Antony Thomas
Art Director: Akhil Damodhar
Executive Producers: Nikhil Ramanath & Amal Xavier Manackatharayil
Sound Mix: Rajakrishnan MR
DI Colorist: Joyner Thomas
Additional Dialogues: Sonu Surendran
Finance Controller: Midhun K Varghese
VFX: Mindstein Studios
Chief Associate Directors: Suku Damodar, Sohil
Stills: Rohith K Suresh
Title Design: Sarcasanam
PRO: Vaisakh C Vadakkeveedu & Jinu Anilkumar
Publicity Designs: Yellowtooths
Digital Content: Dripwave Collective

Lyrics: 
Maanam Vaappaante 
B - maanam Vaappaanthe 
per annum Vaappaante - 
Shatha - Kodi

Stardom Vaappaante
Paytm Vaappaante 
KTM Vaappaante
Beta - Dhaande  !!

tail mele kuthiyaadane (Dhaande)
rail pole trippyaadane x 2 

Patti show  
Jetti show
Idakkidakku petty show
Thalaykkuzhinjarinjerinja pacharikku pathu show
Mothamaayi Mathi Show
Mothamaale nirthi Show
Fake  pandam methaninju DP-ittu thotti show

(Patti Show
Patti Show
Patti Show
Patti Show )

Othaikku otha vaada
Naa gettikaaran da
Vethala paakku beeda
Naa madichi thaarean da
Ippudu ippudu choodu 
Naa ishta kaaran da
Chakkara chakkara cheeni 
Na patti scene da

Tharamana kallu kitta
Orasi paakkatha
Padhanaalu pallu poitta
Nurse ha kekkatha
Pangali bamma bamma 
Bamma nammaale
Singari Singam Singam 
Singam nammaale 

Thug uh ma  Thug uh ma 
Thug uh varan Thallu ma
Thug uh varan Thallu ma 
Sollu ma Sollu ma 

So so so so so so 
Solo king uh varan sollu ma

Kaane Maamane !
Thani ‘Show’guna Raavanan
Thiru-4K Show-nakan
Pothujana-Naduvilu
Prakadana Mikavithu Kaanane!!

(Maanam Vaappante)

College-ku gethu naanu da
Tail-mele kuthiyaadane

Knowledge-kku vithuvaan nu da
Rail pole trippyaadane

Ketta Show
Atta Show
Idaykkidaku Potta Show
Chavacharacha gum pole
Thottidathu Otti Show
What about Orotta show?
Next time, Not a show!
Michamundu ?
Kashtamundu
Nirthivekku
Petti Show !


Label: Saregama India Limited, A RPSG Group Company

To buy the original and virus free track, visit www.saregama.com
Follow us on: YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/user/Saregamamalayalam
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/Saregamamalayalam
X: https://twitter.com/saregamasouth​​

#PattiShow #Athiradi #BasilJoseph #SaregamaMalayalam

snippet.description:
Experience the timeless romance of Tera Chehra from the film Sanam Teri Kasam in stunning 8K/4K quality. Featuring Harshvardhan Rane and Mawra Hocane this soulful track is sung by Arijit Singh with composed by Himesh Reshammiya.

#terachehra #8k #arijitsingh #8kvideo  #sanamterikasam #harshvardhanrane #himeshreshammiya

Credits:
Song - Tera Chehra
Singer - Arijit Singh
Composer - Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist - Himesh Reshammiya, Shabbir Ahmedd

Lyrics:
Meri bechainiyon ko chain mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Mere deewanepan ko sabr mil jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Zikr tumhara jab jab hota hai
Dekho na aankhon se
bheega bheega pyaar beh jaata hai

Meri tanhaiyon ko noor mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Main raat-din ye duaa karun
Tere liye main jiyun marun
Chaaron pehar tujhe dekha karun
Mera jahan ye tujhpe fanaa karun

Zikr tumhara jab jab hota hai
Dekho na honthon pe tera ehsaas
Reh jaata hai

Mere har raaste ko manzil mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Berang hawayein mujhe naa jaane
De gayi sadaa kyun abhi abhi
Hai sarfaroshi ye aashiqui bhi
Jaayegi jaan meri isme kabhi

Zikr tumhara jab jab hota hai
Dekho na har lamha teri daastaan
keh jaata hai

Meri har ik tadap ko sukoon mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

snippet.title: घर में चलाओ ये सुंदरकांड पाठ 🏡 सारी परेशानियां दूर होंगी | Full Path -Sampurn Sunderkand
snippet.description:
घर में चलाओ ये सुंदरकांड पाठ 🏡 सारी परेशानियां दूर होंगी | Full Path -Sampurn Sunderkand
घर में चलाओ ये सुंदरकांड पाठ 🏡 सारी परेशानियां दूर होंगी | Full Path -Sampurn Sunderkand

Album :- Sampurn Sunderkand
Song :-  Sampurn Sunderkand
Singer :- Ravi Raj 
Lyrics :- Dinesh Railhan 
Music :- Railhan Studios 
Recording - Kailash Ji 
Makeup - Shivu Makeovers 
Director - Vivek Singh
Digital Partner : Lokdhun 
Label / Company :- Bhakti Dhaam 
VG - 44632

Spotify -  https://open.spotify.com/album/1rAHzMZye5CFjUII4NKB5l
Instagram -    https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/1218369780381010/
Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/sampurn-sunderkand-2688-7175
Jio Saavan - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/sampurn-sunderkand/Oz4-SytYVn0
Apple - https://music.apple.com/in/album/sampurn-sunderkand/1876480389?i=1876480391
Amazon -  https://music.apple.com/in/album/sampurn-sunderkand/1876480389?i=1876480391
YT Music -  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=meKYP8Q6aAY 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

सुन्दरकांड” – श्री राम चरित मानस का 5 वा अध्याय/कांड है। सुन्दर कांड (Sundar Kand) को सबसे पहले रामायण में श्री वाल्मीकि जी ने संस्कृत में लिखा था। बाद में तुलसी दस जी ने जब श्री राम चरित मानस लिखी, तो सुन्दर कांड का अवधी भाषा वाला रूप हम सब के सामने आया 
सुन्दरकाण्ड में हनुमान जी का सीता माता को खोजने के लिए की गयी लंका यात्रा का सम्पूर्ण मनमोहक बखान किया गया है।
सुन्दरकांड एक ऐसा भाग है जो सिर्फ हनुमान जी की वीरता का बखान करता है । सुन्दर कांड हनुमान जी पर केंद्रित सबसे पुरानी रचना है। ऐसा माना जाता है के सुन्दरकाण्ड के पाठ से सभी मनोकामनाएं पूर्ण होती हैं ।

सुन्दर कांड के फायदे | Benefits of - Sunder Kand
 यह कहा जाता है कि चालीस सप्ताह तक लगातार जो कोई श्रद्धापूर्वक Sundarkand का पाठ करता है, तो उसके सभी मनोरथ पूरे होते हैं तथा जीवन के सभी कष्ट, दुःख, परेशानियाँ दूर हो जाती हैँ । कई ज्योतिषी भी विपरित परिस्थितियों में सुंदरकांड करने की ही सलाह देते हैं। यदि किसी व्यक्ति के जीवन में अत्यधिक परेशानियां हो तथा कोई काम नहीं बन पा रहा है, आत्मविश्वास की कमी हो तो सुंदरकांड के पाठ से शुभ फल प्राप्त होता है।

सुन्दरकांड” – श्री राम चरित मानस का 5 वा अध्याय/कांड है। सुन्दर कांड (Sundar Kand) को सबसे पहले रामायण में श्री वाल्मीकि जी ने संस्कृत में लिखा था। बाद में तुलसी दस जी ने जब श्री राम चरित मानस लिखी, तो सुन्दर कांड का अवधी भाषा वाला रूप हम सब के सामने आया 
सुन्दरकाण्ड में हनुमान जी का सीता माता को खोजने के लिए की गयी लंका यात्रा का सम्पूर्ण मनमोहक बखान किया गया है।
सुन्दरकांड एक ऐसा भाग है जो सिर्फ हनुमान जी की वीरता का बखान करता है । सुन्दर कांड हनुमान जी पर केंद्रित सबसे पुरानी रचना है। ऐसा माना जाता है के सुन्दरकाण्ड के पाठ से सभी मनोकामनाएं पूर्ण होती हैं ।
